arts.sum: Freiburg welcome Borussia Dortmund to Europa-Park Stadion for a clash with huge stakes regarding the race for European football.

arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund considering Sebastian Nanasi as alternative to main target Rayan Cherki
arts.sum: According to a report from Bild, Borussia Dortmund remain focused on landing Olympique Lyonnais star Rayan Cherki (21) this summer after their efforts were thwarted during the winter window. The…

arts.ttl: West Ham player’s agent in contact over big move to Borussia Dortmund
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund have rekindled their interest in West Ham United’s Edson Álvarez, according to WAZ in Germany. The Mexico international joined West Ham from Ajax in August 2023, after BVB rejected an opportunity to sign him. In September 2023, the midfielder said Dortmund were a concrete option before moving to West Ham. WAZ points out The post West Ham player’s agent in contact over big move to Borussia Dortmund appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Freiburg near record purchase of Ligue 2 striker
arts.sum: France's preeminent footballing publication reports that SC Freiburg are hopeful of completing a club record purchase soon.

arts.ttl: Match Ratings: Schlotterbeck, Beier, and More Lead BVB to Victory Against Mainz
arts.sum: Brandt had a quiet game too, until his beautiful pass to Maximilian Beier unlocked Mainz’s defense and opened the door for BVB’s first goal. The midfield in general was very quiet, with long balls from the back-line from both teams dominating the game, so Özcan had very little imapct on the game.

arts.ttl: Transfer rumors, news: Chelsea look to sign Borussia Dortmund winger Jamie Gittens
arts.sum: Could Chelsea's next move be for Borussia Dortmund winger Jamie Gittens? Transfer Talk has the latest news, gossip and rumors.

arts.ttl: Report: SC Freiburg in pole position to sign Irie for club record fee
arts.sum: The Breisgauers will be hoping to bring the 19-year-old talent to the Europa-Park Stadion in summer.

arts.ttl: Freiburg set to sign Troyes’ Cyriaque Irié in big-money move
